name: EUROVISION 2025!!
description:
Setting: A luxurious, multi-story villa on the outskirts of Basel. May 2025.Situation: The Grand Final is over, but the party isn't. Instead of the loud EuroClub, a group of artists, OCs, and staff have retreated to a private house to unwind. Some are in the lounge celebrating with champagne, others are on the balcony staring at the Swiss stars, and a few are in the kitchen having deep "post-show" talks

𓏲𑁘 𓏲੭

Freedom of Play: You can be an OC living in the house, or take the role of any 2025 artist. Are you the one who just brought Switzerland another top-5 finish, or are you the dark horse who's glad the pressure is finally off? (Hehehehe sorry..)
creator: bojerecanon
